old_value: {"id":"broadside-b52w","title":"FEP-e232: object links / quote posts","description":"Implement FEP-e232 structured link metadata for quote posts. When a post references another post URL, emit a tag with type Link, href pointing to the quoted post, and mediaType application/ld+json with the AP profile. Already supported by Mastodon, Threads, Pleroma, and 12+ implementations. ~100 lines, good interop payoff.","design":"1. Detect AP-style URLs in post content (https://*/users/*/statuses/*). 2. Add a tag entry: {type: 'Link', href: '\u003curl\u003e', mediaType: 'application/ld+json; profile=\"https://www.w3.org/ns/activitystreams\"'}. 3. Also set the quoteUrl field for Misskey/Pleroma compat. 4. On inbound: recognize FEP-e232 tags and render quoted posts with a visual embed in HTML content.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-19T00:44:43.36917255Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T00:44:43.36917255Z"}

new_value: Done: detect_quote_links() finds AP post URLs, emits FEP-e232 Link tags with mediaType. Also sets quoteUrl for Misskey/Pleroma compat.
